S

Scene - Class in paletai.mapping
A class that manages a collection of MediaItems as a single scene.
Scene() - Constructor for class paletai.mapping.Scene
Constructs a new empty Scene.
sceneXML - Variable in class paletai.mapping.Scene
XML configuration for scene serialization
Screen - Class in paletai.mapping
Represents a physical or virtual display screen for video mapping.
Screen(PApplet, int) - Constructor for class paletai.mapping.Screen
Constructs a new Screen with the specified ID.
setParameter(String, float) - Method in interface paletai.generators.LunaContentGenerator
Sets the value of a specific parameter.
setPreviewArea(float, float, float, float) - Method in class paletai.mapping.MediaItem
Sets the preview area dimensions for homography point display.
setPreviewArea(float, float, float, float) - Method in class paletai.mapping.Screen
Sets the preview area dimensions for media item preview rendering.
setPreviewArea(float, float, float, float) - Method in class paletai.mapping.VidMap
Sets the preview area for calibration point display.
setThumbnailPosition(int, int) - Method in class paletai.mapping.MediaItem
Sets the thumbnail position and updates control group placement.
setTransitionState(ArrayList<MediaItem>, ArrayList<MediaItem>, float) - Method in class paletai.mapping.Screen
Sets up transition state between two sets of media items.
setup(int, int) - Method in interface paletai.generators.LunaContentGenerator
Initializes the generator with the target display dimensions.
show() - Method in class paletai.mapping.Screen
Displays the screen buffer at its assigned position.
showControls() - Method in class paletai.mapping.MediaItem
Shows the media item's control group.
stopMedia() - Method in class paletai.mapping.MediaItem
Stops media playback and cleans up resources.
